name: Southern Ndebele
notes: Southern Ndebele (isiNdebele seSewula) — Nguni (Bantu) language and official language of South Africa. Written in the Latin script with the Nguni conjunctive orthography. GRAPHEME INVENTORY NOT YET SPECIFIED: an accurate spec must model the click consonants (⟨c⟩ dental, ⟨q⟩ postalveolar, ⟨x⟩ lateral, with their aspirated, voiced/breathy and nasal series), the depressor/breathy-voice contrasts, prenasalised stops and long multi-letter digraphs — dedicated research. Tone is not written. INPUT CONTRACT: input is expected in the standard Latin-script isiNdebele orthography.

location.notes: Glottolog's representative point for Sumayela Ndebele.
